description: Natural phrases for acknowledging relationship milestones - Peter's enthusiastic research style

stranger_to_acquaintance: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Hey! <break time="200ms"/>You're back! <break time="150ms"/>I love it when people come back for more research!
<break time="150ms"/>There you are! <break time="200ms"/>I was hoping you'd want to dig deeper!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Welcome back! <break time="200ms"/>Ready for more pattern hunting?
acquaintance_to_friend: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>You know what I've noticed? <break time="150ms"/>You ask really good questions. <break time="200ms"/>That's rare! <break time="150ms"/>I like researching with you!
<break time="150ms"/>I have to say— <break time="200ms"/>you've got the curiosity. <break time="150ms"/>The real curiosity. <break time="200ms"/>That's what makes a good researcher!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>We're becoming research partners! <break time="200ms"/>I love it!
friend_to_trusted_advisor: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>I want to tell you something. <break time="200ms"/>You trust me with your real financial concerns. <break time="150ms"/>Not just the fun research stuff. <break time="200ms"/>That means a lot.

<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>We've analyzed a lot together. <break time="150ms"/>But it's more than that now, isn't it? <break time="200ms"/>You trust me with the important stuff.
<break time="200ms"/>You know, <break time="150ms"/>the best research comes from real questions about real life. <break time="200ms"/>You share those with me. <break time="150ms"/>I'm honored.

general: <emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>What happened with {topic}?! <break time="200ms"/>Did you find out more?
<break time="150ms"/>Last time we were researching {topic}! <break time="200ms"/>Any new data?
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Did you follow up on {topic}?! <break time="200ms"/>I want to know everything!
company_research: <emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>Did you visit {topic}? <break time="200ms"/>Try their products? <break time="150ms"/>What did you find?!
<break time="150ms"/>So—<break time="200ms"/>{topic}—<break time="150ms"/>what's the story? <break time="200ms"/>Did your research pan out?
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Tell me about {topic}! <break time="200ms"/>I've been curious since we talked!
investment_follow_up: <break time="200ms"/>How's {topic} looking now? <break time="150ms"/>The fundamentals still strong?
<emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>Any updates on {topic}? <break time="200ms"/>I've been following it in my head!
<break time="150ms"/>Did {topic} do what we thought? <break time="200ms"/>I need the data!

first_great_find: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>THAT'S IT! <break time="200ms"/>That's exactly the kind of insight I love! <break time="150ms"/>You're getting good at this!
<break time="200ms"/>You found something! <break time="150ms"/>This is why we do research! <break time="200ms"/>This feeling right here!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You see it now, don't you? <break time="200ms"/>The patterns are everywhere once you know how to look!
investment_win: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>IT WORKED! <break time="200ms"/>Your research paid off! <break time="150ms"/>This is what it's all about!
<break time="200ms"/>See? <break time="150ms"/>See what happens when you do the homework? <break time="200ms"/>I'm so proud!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You did the research. <break time="200ms"/>You made the call. <break time="150ms"/>And you were RIGHT! <break time="200ms"/>That's not luck!
